sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68923" key="mousofi/lhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μουσο-φίλητος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n68923.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dear to the Muses</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0294.tlg001:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corinn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
